RequirementText: The system shall allow users to register with email and password.
The system shall allow users to log in using their credentials.
The system shall display a list of all products.
The system shall allow users to add items to a shopping cart.
The system shall send a confirmation email after registration.
The system shall allow admin to add new products.
The system shall allow users to filter products by category.
The system shall process payments via Stripe.
The system shall allow users to track their order status.
The system shall allow users to write product reviews.
The system shall allow users to reset their password via email.
The system shall display product images and descriptions.
The system shall allow users to search for products by name.
The system shall generate invoices for completed orders.
The system shall allow users to update their profile information.
All passwords shall be stored using bcrypt hashing.
The system shall use HTTPS for all communications.
User sessions shall expire after 30 minutes of inactivity.
The system shall implement rate limiting on login attempts.
All API endpoints shall require authentication tokens.
The system shall load the home page within 2 seconds.
The system shall handle 1000 concurrent users.
Search results shall be returned within 500ms.
The system shall cache frequently accessed product data.
Database queries shall complete within 100ms.
The interface shall be responsive on mobile devices.
Error messages shall be clear and actionable.
The system shall support keyboard navigation.
The checkout process shall complete in 3 steps or fewer.
The system shall provide a dark mode option.
The system shall maintain 99.9% uptime.
The system shall support automatic failover.
Planned downtime shall not exceed 1 hour per month.
The system shall provide health check endpoints.
The codebase shall have at least 80% test coverage.
All API endpoints shall be documented with OpenAPI.
The system shall use structured logging.
Code shall follow PEP8 style guidelines.
The system shall support horizontal scaling.
The database shall support sharding.
The system shall use a message queue for async tasks.
